examples: You only need a very small blob of glue, so one tube lasts for ages.
The BLOB domain can be used when the message is treated as opaque, not parsed, and simply routed.
Although internally the XML is stored in a hierarchical format, logically in the database table it appears to be stored in a CLOB or BLOB.
The gray-green knitted blob next to the sofa seemed larger than it had that morning.
The infrared imagery revealed a little bright blob in the disk, suggesting an entity emitting radiation.
